expectations.evidence: turbopartner/client.py exists as a TurboPartner client file, and turbopartner/apps.py also configures TurboPartner
turbopartner/apps.py calls TurboPartner.configure(partner_api_key=partner_api_key, partner_id=partner_id, base_url=base_url) in the ready() method
turbopartner/views.py exists with comprehensive views for organizations, users, API keys, audit logs, etc.
turbopartner/urls.py defines urlpatterns and myproject/urls.py includes it via path('api/turbopartner/', include('turbopartner.urls'))
turbopartner/views.py uses @api_view decorators from rest_framework, Response class, and Django URL patterns in urls.py
No file contains APIRouter, FastAPI(), or @app.post patterns
No file (.env, .env.example, or any other) contains TURBODOCX_API_KEY
